title: andryala perezii
intro: Andryala perezii, also known as Andryala, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Andryala perezii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Andryala perezii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
